hero.sub: Today is all about celebrating the most beautiful person in my world.
hero.body: Every smile of yours lights up my life, and every moment with you becomes a memory I never want to lose.

items.title: Where It All Began
items.text: From our very first conversation, something shifted in my world.

items.title: Falling For You
items.text: Every laugh, every glance — I found myself falling deeper every day.

items.title: Us Against The World
items.text: Side by side, we turned ordinary moments into extraordinary memories.

items.title: Today & Always
items.text: You have brought happiness, warmth, and meaning into my world in ways I never imagined.

photos.label: han bus Tumhen hi Rahana hai

items.text: The happiness you bring into my life

letter.title: A Letter From My Heart 💌
letter.body: Someone once said something very true: when I wasn’t even looking for you, I found you. But now I want you to stay with me forever. I feel like you are the one person I have been looking for all this time. Now that I have found you, I don’t want anything else. Don’t worry, I am with you in every situation and every condition. Whenever you need me, I will be there with you, and I will never let go of your hand. I will never fall short in loving you. I have so many things to write, but I feel like this space will not be enough because there is so much love that it cannot be expressed in words.

wish.title: My Birthday Wish For You 🎂
wish.body: I want you to always be happy, and I hope you get everything you want. May all your dreams come true. I am with you in every situation, and I will always be there for you. May you always have good health and stay happy wherever you are.

proposal.title: One More Special Surprise ❤️
proposal.sub: There is something I have wanted to tell you from the bottom of my heart.
proposal.heading: Will You Be Mine Forever? 💍
proposal.body: Even though we haven’t met yet and we only talk on calls, somehow you have become such a special part of my life. I really enjoy every conversation we have, and talking to you has become one of my favorite parts of the day. I don’t just want to celebrate your birthday today, I hope one day I can be there with you to celebrate your future birthdays, your dreams, your success, and all the beautiful moments in your life. I don’t know what the future holds, but I do know that I want you to be a part of it. I love you. ❤️
proposal.celebration: 🎉 You Just Made Me The Happiest Person In The World ❤️

forever.title: Forever Starts Here 💕
forever.body: We haven’t met yet, but somehow you have already become such a special part of my life. I don’t know what forever holds, but if I had a choice, I’d choose you to be a part of mine. ❤️

login.heading: Welcome, My Love
login.subheading: Enter your special date to unlock your surprise.
login.errorMsg: Oops! Try your special date again ❤️
login.successSub: Your surprise is waiting for you...
login.tagline: Made with endless love, just for you 💕
login.hint: Hint: the day you came into this world 🌸
